product_name: Fra-Ber Neve Yoğun Köpüklü Araç Yıkama Şampuanı Cilalı Parfümlü Oto Köpüğü - 1 Lt

sources.cleaned_content:
# Neve

Foamy shampoo for deep cleansing

Neve is the active foam car shampoo with a dense, full-bodied foam that durably adheres to the bodywork.

The main features:

- Snow effect: when used, it creates a thick and full-bodied foam that durably adheres to the bodywork to reduce the friction of car-wash brushes or the mitt, thus minimising the formation of micro-scratches.
- Deep cleaning: it can remove all types of dirt and road contaminants.
- Carefully formulated: the product contains no added sodium hydroxide, phosphates and NTA*.
- Suitable for all vehicles: it can be used on all types of vehicles including sports cars, utility vehicles, vans, camper vans, trucks and motorbikes.
- Floral fragrance: it leaves a pleasant scent after each application.

*May contain traces.

### Directions for use

- Dilute in water 1:25 – 1:50, you can reach 1:500 for frequent washes, wash with a glove and rinse thoroughly.
- Foam lance: from 1:2 to 1:12, 1:19 used as a pre-wash for weekly dirt.
- Pump: 10-40 pumpings 6 l/h pump capacity 5-40 ml consumption per cycle.
- Dosatron: 0.2-2%.
- Sprayer: 1:50 to 1:500.

### Certifications

No phosphates, NTA, NaOH

#### Formats and article codes

- Format: 4,54 L - Item Code: 700212 - Box: 4 pcs
- Format: 25 kg - Item Code: 70659

### Download

- Technical data sheet (Italian): https://fraberantegnate-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/onedrive_fra-ber_it/EVNXm1r6h7ZJvpvk3DMX2HQBOD6gL2Sy_bXPl3aiePJ5Og?e=1smq8o

# NÈVE

## FOAM PREWASH - NEUTRAL

NÈVE is a chemical prodigy: a neutral foam shampoo with the power similar to an alkaline! NÈVE is a concentrated mix of surfactants highly biodegradable free of phosphates formulated in such a way as to adhere to the surface for a long time, cleaning it thoroughly, softening the dirt and road contamination of all kinds. NÈVE is safe on every surface, even the most delicate gaskets and metal moldings.

Features:
- High foaming power
- Safe wash on protections
- VDA certification

Formats: 1000 ml, 4500 ml

### Description

NÈVE is a prodigy of chemistry: a neutral foam shampoo with power comparable to an alkaline one!

NÈVE is a concentrate of highly biodegradable surfactants without any phosphates, formulated in such a way as to adhere on the surface for a long time, cleansing it thoroughly, softening dirt and road contamination of any kind.

NÈVE is safe on any surface, even the most delicate trims and metal mouldings. Thanks to the significant presence in its formula of chelating agents of calcium carbonates, NÈVE is able to maintain high performance even in hard water, decreasing the risk of leaving residues in the drying stage.

NÈVE is safe on applied protection, be it wax, sealants or nanotechnological coatings.

The refined composition of NÈVE, makes this shampoo safe even if used in sunlight.

### How to use

NÈVE can be used in foam mode respecting the dilution output, in Nebula atomizer mode or in spray mode. Dispense the product in the preferred way from bottom to top in a homogeneous way, then leave the product on for a few minutes until the foam dissolves, so as to perform the cleaning action and rinsing starting from the bottom upwards in a homogeneous way. In cases of more stubborn dirt it is advisable to use the product in spray mode so as to have more speed in the cleaning phase. Minimum dilution 1:25 – maximum 1:50 in spear foam. Extremely concentrated product to be used with the recommended dilutions. Overdosing creates a heavy foam resulting in a loss of adhesion to the surface. Also NÈVE, like all #Labocosmetica products, is designed, formulated and manufactured in Italy.

Instructions:

Step 1: Dilute 1:25 to 1:50 depending on the contamination conditions and dispense evenly with a foam gun.
Step 2: Wait 5 minutes.
Step 3: Rinse before the foam dries. Use the wash mitt according to the level of contamination.

Dilution Ratios:
- FOAM GUN: 1:25 (minimum) – 1:50 (maximum)
- STURDY DIRT (EXTERIOR): 1:5
- MEDIUM DIRT (EXTERIOR): 1:10
- NEBULA PUMP: 1:20

### Product details

Car parts: Wrapping/matt, External, Car Body, Glass, Crystals
Materials: Aluminium, Paint, Glass, PPF
Type: Shampoo, Prewash

### Warnings

P102 Keep out of the reach of children.
H319 Causes serious eye irritation.
P280 Wear eye protection / face protection.
P305 + P351 + P338 IN CASE OF EYE CONTACT: rinse thoroughly for several minutes. Remove any contact lenses if easy to do. Continue rinsing.
Contains 1,2-benzisothiazol-3 (2H) -one. May cause an allergic reaction.

Data sheet: https://labocosmetica.com/ENG/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/EN_data-sheet-NEVE-1.pdf

## SAFE FOR WAX

NÈVE only removes dirt without damaging the existing wax layers. Snow-effect foam shampoo with the sweet scent of Italian peach that combines a decontamination capacity similar to that of an alkaline.

### EXCELLENT!

Excellent dilution ratio and excellent decontaminating power.
High concentration 1000ml!
Large capacity, environmentally friendly.

NEVE is a highly concentrated product that drips much more slowly than other products and is suitable for removing contaminants that have long been present on the paint surface.
